name: reading-wechat-publisher
description: Turn books into structured notes, Guizang-style social assets, WeChat drafts, and Xiaohongshu-ready packages.

interface.shortDescription: Book-note workflow for WeChat and Xiaohongshu drafts
interface.longDescription: Analyze a book, shape it into a WeChat article, generate Guizang-style visual packages, and prepare WeChat or Xiaohongshu draft outputs with the bundled workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use $reading-social-publisher to turn this book into a WeChat and Xiaohongshu-ready social package.
Use $reading-strategy to analyze a book into a structured markdown note.
Use $wechat-article-designer to turn my note into a WeChat-ready article with Guizang-style visuals.
Use $wechat-publisher to upload assets and send the approved article to WeChat draft.
